title: Are UFOs Just a Pysop?
summary: This interview discusses the possibility that UFOs are neither purely fabricated government psyops nor entirely authentic extraterrestrial phenomena, but rather a complex combination where government agencies exploit existing underlying phenomena for psychological warfare purposes. The conversation references historical religious experiences and folklore as potential parallels to modern alien encounters.

acronyms.definition: U.S. intelligence agency responsible for national security

events.description: Walter B. Smith, director of the CIA, stated the government would play up the UFO phenomena for psychological warfare purposes during the Cold War

key_claims.claim: There has never been a leaked government document stating they would wholesale fabricate UFOs
Walter B. Smith, CIA director in 1953, stated the government would play up the UFO phenomena for psychological warfare purposes
The government uses existing underlying phenomena for its own purposes rather than fabricating them entirely
Historical religious experiences like those of St. Francis of Assisi and St. Teresa are comparable to modern alien abduction experiences
